action_text: Press Escape to close the search context popover
rationale: The “Choose search context” popover is blocking the list controls; pressing Escape should dismiss it so I can use the list filter/search on this page.

action_text: Click the global search context icon to dismiss the popover
rationale: The popover likely came from the global search context button; clicking it again should toggle/close the popover so I can interact with the report list.

action_text: Click inside the report list row area to dismiss the popover
rationale: Clicking into the report list area should defocus the global search and close the popover, allowing access to list filtering.

action_text: Toggle the list filter (Show/Hide filter) for the reports list
rationale: Once the popover is closed, enabling the list filter is the most direct way to search by Title for “Incidents by agent.”

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort reports by title
rationale: If filtering isn’t available yet, sorting by Title can help quickly locate the desired report within the list.
